title: taraxacum triviale
intro: Taraxacum triviale, also known as the lesser dandelion or small dandelion, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family, Asteraceae. The plant contains compounds with medicinal properties, including taraxasterol, which has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum triviale include its potential to support liver health, reduce inflammation, and improve digestion. The herbal preparations of Taraxacum triviale typically involve its leaves and roots being used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
